text: Scheme document published - vote on 26 May
H1 trading update - revenue up by 5.0%, adjusted EBITDA by 27.7%
On European tracker: Board rejects £5.80 per share proposal from Energy Capital Partners & KKR
New addition: £183m formal offer by Döhler (which owns 27.9%)
PUSU deadline extended to 26 May 2026, due diligence at an advanced stage
